title: [PatPat] Hide Hand
description: Just a resource pack to hide default hand from PatPat Mod
body:
Simple resource pack which hide default hand animation from PatPat Mod. The sound is still there!

Just download it, load in game, and enjoy!

![Patting entity with no hand animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94bdc5265f7e24ec46e280287fbfb2b283044c8c.gif)
